creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Unfortunately this has caused additional breakage, when python is not selected. It's still required to build.

===>  Building for syslog-ng-3.20.1
gmake[2]: Entering directory '/export/wrkdir/amd64/usr/ports/sysutils/syslog-ng/work/syslog-ng-3.20.1'
Makefile:22291: *** "Python interpreter is required to generate grammar files, but it was not detected during configure".  Stop.
gmake[2]: Leaving directory '/export/wrkdir/amd64/usr/ports/sysutils/syslog-ng/work/syslog-ng-3.20.1'
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/sysutils/syslog-ng
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/sysutils/syslog-ng

There still needs to be a build requirement but no install requirement.
